[http://www.linemax.de/ Linemax] |facebook= https://www.facebook.com/whynunuwhyy |twitter= mymTw |youtube= https://www.youtube.com/user/mtwmovie |created= |disbanded= 2012-09-07 |trades= }} mortal Teamwork is a now-defunct German multigaming organization. == Overview == == History == {{TDRight |name1=2011 |name2=2012}} {{TDRight|tab}} *January, team disbands. *February 5, mTw acquires the apeX eSports team of '''[[Redsn0w]]''', '''[[Caress]]''', '''[[Mampfi]]''', '''[[RaidbawZ]]''', '''[[WhO-yOu]]''', and '''[[Wuuuh]]'''. *May 30, '''[[RaidbawZ]]''' leaves.[http://www.absolutelegends.net/news/display/1544/Raidbawz-leaves-mTwEU RaidbawZ leaves mTw.EU] ''"absolutelegends.net"'' *September 2, 2nd place at [[ESL Pro Series Germany/Summer 2012]] *September 7, mTw disbands.[http://www.mymtw.de/de/article/23016/ref-topnews/league-of-legends_vorerst-ohne-lol-team_weitere-vernderungen-bei-mtw.html Weitere Veränderungen bei mTw] ''"mymtw.de"'' {{TDRight|tab}} *March 11, mTw acquires roster of Pro Killers. '''[[Xymii]]''', '''[[Iyafacebiaatch]]''' (now '''sNes'''), '''[[Fairnuenftig]]''' (now '''imm'''), '''[[LarissaLover]]''' (now '''amcii'''), and '''[[FabiOMG]]''' (now '''Ultraviolet''') join.[http://web.archive.org/web/20110324051556/http://www.mymtw.com/de/article/22738/gtp-1/ mTw goes League of Legends] ''"web.archive.org"'' *August 15, '''[[MoMa]]''' joins.[http://www.sk-gaming.com/content/34393-mTwLoL_pick_up_MoMa_from_M mTw.LoL pick up MoMa from M]''"sk-gaming.com"'' *October, [[MoMa]] leaves. {{TDRight/end}} == Player Roster == ===Former=== {|class="sortable wikitable" ! !ID !Name !Role !Next Team |- {{listplayer|Redsn0w|de|David Schneider|Support|newteam=logiX}} {{listplayer|Caress|de|Alexander Hoffmann|Top|newteam=logiX}} {{listplayer|WhO-yOu|de||Mid|newteam=logiX}} {{listplayer|Wuuuh|de|Sean Kosbü|AD|newteam=myRevenge}} {{listplayer|Mampfi|de|Matthias Baumann|Jungle|newteam=none}} {{listplayer|RaidbawZ|de|Tobias Podeszwa|Sub|newteam=none}} {{listplayer|MoMa|de|Maik Wallus|Top|newteam=sk}} {{listplayer|sNes|de|Erik Weber|Jungle|newteam=none}} {{listplayer|Snuggels|de|Ari Albertini|Support|newteam=none}} {{listplayer|imm|de|Cem Oezgecen|AD|newteam=none}} {{listplayer|Ultraviolet|de|Fabio Carrozzo|Mid|newteam=ESC Gaming}} {{listplayer|eaZy|de|Kim Alessandro Erdmann|Jungle|newteam=none}} {{listplayer|amcii|de|Amer Sehic|Top|newteam=none}} {{listplayer|Xymii|de|Jonas Majorek|AD|newteam=ESC Gaming}} {{Listplayer/EndTemp}} == Tournaments == {{TeamResults|show=overviewpage}} {{TeamShowmatchResults|show=overviewpage}} == Highlight Videos == ==Interviews== ==Links== ==References==
